title: ctenium bahiense
intro: Ctenium bahiense, also known as Bahia grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenium bahiense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Ctenium bahiense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in folk medicine, but its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and confirmed.
